tasks.label: Magento: Enable Fast Frontend Dev
tasks.command: docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html; rm -rf pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/* var/view_preprocessed/*; php bin/magento cache:disable full_page block_html; php bin/magento config:set dev/css/merge_css_files 0; php bin/magento config:set dev/css/minify_files 0; php bin/magento config:set dev/js/merge_files 0; php bin/magento config:set dev/js/minify_files 0; php bin/magento config:set dev/js/enable_js_bundling 0; php bin/magento cache:flush"

tasks.label: Magento: Refresh Translate Cache
tasks.command: docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html; php bin/magento cache:clean translate"

tasks.label: Magento: Rebuild Frontend Static
tasks.command: docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html; rm -rf pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/* var/view_preprocessed/*; php bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy -f vi_VN en_US; php bin/magento cache:flush"

tasks.label: collect-step1-static
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento/src && find pub/static/frontend -name 'fashionstore-payments-v2.js' 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; find pub/static/frontend -name 'fashionstore-payments.js' 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; find pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore -path '*/CartOptions*' -name '*.js' 2>/dev/null | head -20

tasks.label: collect-step2-rest-api
args: set -e; CART_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost/rest/V1/guest-carts -H "Content-Type: application/json"); echo "Cart ID: $CART_ID"; ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost/rest/V1/integration/admin/token -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'); echo "Admin token: $ADMIN_TOKEN"; echo "--- payment-methods response ---"; curl -s http://localhost/rest/V1/carts/mine/payment-methods -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null

tasks.label: collect-step3-config-db
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && echo '--- config:show via php container ---'; docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html/src; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_momo/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_cod/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_zalopay/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_banktransfer_qr/active"; echo '--- DB query via mysql container ---'; docker compose exec mysql mysql -u magento -pmagento magento -e "SELECT path, value, scope, scope_id FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'payment/fashionstore%' ORDER BY path;" 2>/dev/null

tasks.label: collect-step3-config-db-fixed
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento; echo "--- config:show via php container ---"; docker compose exec php bash -lc 'cd /var/www/html/src; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_momo/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_cod/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_zalopay/active; php bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_banktransfer_qr/active'; echo "--- DB query via mysql container ---"; docker compose exec mysql mysql -u magento -pmagento magento -e "SELECT path, value, scope, scope_id FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'payment/fashionstore%' ORDER BY path;" 2>/dev/null

tasks.label: collect-step3-config-others
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec php php /var/www/html/src/bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_cod/active; docker compose exec php php /var/www/html/src/bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_zalopay/active; docker compose exec php php /var/www/html/src/bin/magento config:show payment/fashionstore_banktransfer_qr/active

tasks.label: collect-step3-db-query-accurate
args: SELECT path, value, scope, scope_id FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'payment/fashionstore%' ORDER BY path;

tasks.label: collect-step3-db-query-fixed2
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec mysql mysql -u magento -pmagento magento -e "SELECT path, value, scope, scope_id FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE 'payment/fashionstore%' ORDER BY path;"

tasks.label: collect-step3-db-query-fixed3
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec mysql mysql -u magento -pmagento magento -e "SELECT path, value, scope, scope_id FROM core_config_data WHERE path LIKE \"payment/fashionstore%\" ORDER BY path;"

tasks.label: collect-step2-rest-api-fixed
args: CART_ID=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost/rest/V1/guest-carts -H "Content-Type: application/json"); echo "Cart ID: $CART_ID"; ADMIN_TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST http://localhost/rest/V1/integration/admin/token -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"username\":\"admin\",\"password\":\"admin123\"}"); echo "Admin token: $ADMIN_TOKEN"; echo "--- payment-methods response ---"; curl -s http://localhost/rest/V1/carts/mine/payment-methods -H "Authorization: Bearer $ADMIN_TOKEN" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null

tasks.label: checkout-rootcause-step1-3-4-5
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && echo '=== STEP1: quote.js head + line numbers ===' && nl -ba src/pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN/Magento_Checkout/js/model/quote.js | sed -n '1,60p' && echo '=== STEP3: quote.js overrides ===' && find src/app/design/frontend/Fashionstore -name 'quote.js' 2>/dev/null && find src/app/code/FashionStore -name 'quote.js' 2>/dev/null && echo '=== STEP4: onepage.phtml checkout config injection ===' && grep -n 'checkoutConfig\|getSerializedCheckoutConfig\|getJsLayout' src/app/design/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/Magento_Checkout/templates/onepage.phtml | head -20 && echo '=== STEP5: CartOptions JS files referencing quote/quoteData ===' && find src/app/code/FashionStore/CartOptions -name '*.js' | xargs grep -l 'quoteData\|quote' 2>/dev/null | head -10

tasks.label: checkout-fix-deploy-correct-path
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html/src; php bin/magento cache:flush; php bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy -f vi_VN"

tasks.label: commit-checkout-fix
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && git add src/app/design/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/Magento_Checkout/layout/checkout_index_index.xml && git add src/app/design/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/web/css/custom.css && git commit -m "fix: remove componentDisabled on shipping-step to fix No Payment Methods"

tasks.label: redeploy-viVN-after-grep-miss
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html/src; php bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy -f vi_VN; php bin/magento cache:flush"

tasks.label: inspect-static-css-location
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento/src && ls -l pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN/css | head -20 && echo '---' && rg -n "checkout-index-index #shipping" pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN -g '*.css' || true

tasks.label: compare-source-vs-static-css-tail
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento/src && echo '--- source tail ---' && tail -n 20 app/design/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/web/css/custom.css && echo '--- static tail ---' && tail -n 20 pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN/css/custom.css

args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento/src && rm -f pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN/css/custom.css && cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && docker compose exec php bash -lc "cd /var/www/html/src; php bin/magento setup:static-content:deploy -f vi_VN --theme Fashionstore/custom; php bin/magento cache:flush" && cd /home/myng/Sites/magento/src && grep -n "checkout-index-index #shipping" pub/static/frontend/Fashionstore/custom/vi_VN/css/custom.css

tasks.label: check-target-files-and-last-commit
args: cd /home/myng/Sites/magento && git diff --name-only && echo '---' && git log -1 --oneline
